title: Paste in Monday docs
excerpt:
I currently cannot paste text from outside of Monday into a Monday doc in my macOS app.  Can be done in browser but not the app. 
The Edit menu for the app contains Copy and Paste options - but when you paste nothing hap…

posts.author: nh44s (Noah Haas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I currently cannot paste text from outside of Monday into a Monday doc in my macOS app. Can be done in browser but not the app.

The Edit menu for the app contains Copy and Paste options - but when you paste nothing happens. Seems like there should be a fix that would be very easy to implement!
